ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Continued To Nov-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Faye Bresler appeared via zoom for Aijan Zhang (executor).

Ms. Bresler stated that at the mandatory settlement conference the property was to be sold at $3,000,000.00, that it was valued at $2,900,000.00 by the probate referee, that Ms. Harrington to provide a revised appraisal, and that they have been receiving offers of $1,600,000.00. The matter is continued to November 5, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-11-2025 Continued To Sep-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated February 22, 2024, is admitted to probate. Aijian Zhang is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 11, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney, III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.
